findings.summary: Session data model is Effect Schema + Drizzle ORM in opencode; localStorage + @solid-primitives/storage in app
Desktop has saveFilePicker/openFilePicker IPC handlers ready; @zip.js/zip.js already used in logging.ts; no export/import exists
CLI export/import commands were deleted; SDK has no export/import endpoints; fork/share endpoints exist but are remote-only
Dialog pattern: lazy import + dialog.show(factory) + @opencode-ai/ui/dialog; 21 dialog components; very consistent pattern
Platform interface abstracts file dialogs — saveFilePickerDialog, openFilePickerDialog, openDirectoryPickerDialog; no direct Electron IPC in app
